events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Richard Starkey, known worldwide as Ringo Starr, the iconic drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his distinctive drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Sir Brian May! What's your top Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: 83 years young! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. Which Rolling Stones track gets you moving every time?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first-ever music video.

angles.name: MTV's First Beat
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV changed the game! 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the first track played. What's your favourite music video from the early days?

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Legacy
angles.copy: 2026 marks the anniversary of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'! Which track from their iconic debut album is still on your playlist?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining event of the 1960s counterculture, began on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the start of Woodstock '69 on its anniversary. Three days of peace, music, and legendary performances. Which artist would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley. His music continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the revolutionary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Hendrix Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his passing. His influence on music is timeless. What's your go-to Hendrix track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The iconic frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are unmistakable. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis and rock 'n' roll icon, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite track from the man himself? As you were!

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's 'Imagine'
events.blurb: Today marks an anniversary related to John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine', which was originally released as a single on October 11, 1971, and re-released in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine The Impact
angles.copy: John Lennon's 'Imagine' is a song that continues to resonate globally. What does this powerful anthem mean to you?

events.title: Anniversary of the first iPod's launch
events.blurb: The first Apple iPod, which promised '1,000 songs in your pocket,' was announced on October 23, 2001, and released on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full Of Music
angles.copy: 2026 marks the anniversary of Apple introducing the original iPod! Did you have one of the first models, and what was the first album you loaded onto it?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme songs, what's your favourite element of the 007 universe?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today. The legendary Beatle's influence on music and culture remains profound.

angles.name: Lennon's Enduring Spirit
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the life and legacy of John Lennon. What's the John Lennon song that resonates most with you?
